title: Contact
metaDescription: Contact ConvertBase.app for policy questions, feedback, advertising concerns or general support.
heading: Contact ConvertBase.app
content: If you need help with a page, want to report an issue, or have questions about privacy, cookies, Google Analytics or Google AdSense, contact us by email.
We review messages related to legal pages, content quality, advertising concerns and general platform feedback.

sections.title: Email
paragraphs: The main contact address for ConvertBase.app is contact@convertbase.app.
Please include the page URL, your browser or device, and a short description of the issue when relevant.

sections.title: Topics we can help with
paragraphs: You can contact us about privacy questions, cookie settings, analytics disclosures, Google AdSense concerns, broken pages or incorrect tool outputs.
We may not reply to promotional or unrelated requests.
